sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id int, start_date date, end_date date);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (1, date '2021-12-11', date '2021-12-31');
UPDATE test_dates SET end_date = date '2022-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, sql_sub(start_date, end_date) AS seconds_difference FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, start_date, end_date) VALUES (2, date '2020-01-01', date '2020-01-02');
